import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/platform-admin/TaxonomyManagement.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import { useState } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-base";
import {
  Settings,
  Plus,
  Edit2,
  Eye,
  EyeOff,
  Tag,
  Globe,

  CheckCircle,

import {
  DOCUMENT_TYPES,

  SECTORS
} from "/src/app/data/taxonomy.ts";

    id: cat.value,
    value: cat.value,
    label: cat.label,
    code: cat.code,
    status: "active",
    isSystemDefault: true,
    createdDate: "2024-01-01",
    usageCount: Math.floor(Math.random() * 150) + 20
  }));

    id: type.value,
    value: type.value,
    label: type.label,

  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/platform-admin/TaxonomyManagement.tsx", currentExports);
